heading: Transferred
label: 5611 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 5611 was editorially reclassified as , Crime Control and Law Enforcement.section 11111 of Title 34

Education and Outreach to Trafficking Survivors, , , which required the Attorney General to make available, on the website of the Office of Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention, educational and outreach information for trafficking victim advocates, crisis hotline personnel, foster parents, law enforcement personnel, and crime survivors, was editorially reclassified as , Crime Control and Law Enforcement.Pub.
